privileged_info_summary: This task uses the 'Annual-Report-2023' document stored at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023 in Nuxeo Platform. The document is a real 8-page PDF file (ACME Corporation Annual Report 2023, 9.6 KB) from the environment's data directory. The task involves completing a SerialDocumentReview workflow by adding the exact comment 'Reviewed and approved. Content is accurate and complete.' and clicking the Validate button. The workflow is a sequential review process configured in simpleReview mode with the Administrator user as the single reviewer.
